A reservation group can only be deleted if it does not contain any child reservations.
Creates a migration workflow in the BigQuery Migration API. A migration workflow contains a list of subtasks that are executed to migrate a data warehouse to BigQuery.
Deleting a configuration stops future transfer runs but does not remove data that has already been transferred to BigQuery.
